text.title: Azure Front Door Premium (Global LB + WAF + CDN) Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every application of `Azure Front Door Premium (Global LB + WAF + CDN)` must enforce. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Production origins MUST use Private Link blocks; public-internet origins in prod are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Public-internet origin leg defeats Private Link security + lets attackers bypass FD WAF.

rule.statement: App Gateway / origin NSG MUST restrict inbound to the `AzureFrontDoor.Backend` service tag on 80/443 — direct internet access is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Direct origin reachability lets attackers route around Front Door entirely.

rule.statement: Deploy pipelines MUST wait ≥ 15 minutes for Front Door config propagation before final health checks.
rule.rationale: Premature health checks fail because half the PoPs still serve old config.

rule.statement: WAF policy MUST enable both OWASP CRS 3.2 and bot protection ruleset on internet-facing routes.
rule.rationale: Bot protection drops commodity scraping + credential stuffing at the edge cheaply.

rule.statement: Separate origin groups MUST be used for public vs private origins. Mixing them in the same origin group is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Mixed origin groups cause traffic to randomly hit public endpoints, leaking traffic.

rule.statement: When preconditions in `Applies If` fail OR any item in `Skip If` triggers, do not run this methodology. Document the skip rationale in the artefact's parent log.
rule.rationale: Misapplied methodologies are worse than no methodology — they consume review cycles and produce false confidence.
